## Banner class

A banner result is just an item that has been inserted into the search results to advertise something. Usually it is the first item in the grid or it can be placed in the middle of them and fill the whole row where appears. It just contains a link to the banner content, an image and a title.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class Banner extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue
